text:
```sql data-team-dbt/models/marts/project/fct_project_reconcilliation.sql
{{ config(sort="project_id") }}

with
    reconcilliation_report as (select * from {{ ref("stg_reconcilliation_report") }}),

    reconcilliation_project as (select * from {{ ref("stg_reconcilliation_project") }}),

    business_currency_exchange as (
        select * from {{ ref("int_business_currency_exchange") }}
    ),

    reconcilliation_project_latest as (
        select
            id,
            battery_discounted_leasing_months,
            battery_income_from_customer_loc,
            battery_income_from_edea_loc,
            battery_transfer_pricing_discount_loc,
            ev_charger_income_from_customer_loc,
            ev_charger_income_from_edea_loc,
            country_code,
            currency,
            other_income_from_customer_loc,
            other_income_from_edea_loc,
            pv_discounted_leasing_months,
            pv_income_from_customer_loc,
            pv_income_from_edea_loc,
            pv_transfer_pricing_discount_loc,
            total_battery_income_loc,
            total_ev_charger_income_loc,
            total_income_loc,
            total_income_from_customer_loc,
            total_income_from_edea_loc,
            total_other_income_loc,
            total_pv_income_loc,
            city_tax_loc,
            hardware_order_sourcing_cost_loc,
            project_id,
            report_id,
            project_bookable_at,
            project_invoiced_at,
            created_at,
            {{
                ordinal_num_reverse(
                    partition_by_column="project_id",
                    order_by_column="created_at",
                )
            }} as ordinal_num_reverse
        from reconcilliation_project
    ),

    project_reconcilliation as (
        select
            rp.id,
            rp.battery_discounted_leasing_months,
            rp.battery_income_from_customer_loc,
            rp.battery_income_from_edea_loc,
            rp.battery_transfer_pricing_discount_loc,
            rp.currency,
            rp.ev_charger_income_from_customer_loc,
            rp.ev_charger_income_from_edea_loc,
            rp.country_code,
            rp.other_income_from_customer_loc,
            rp.other_income_from_edea_loc,
            rp.pv_discounted_leasing_months,
            rp.pv_income_from_customer_loc,
            rp.pv_income_from_edea_loc,
            rp.pv_transfer_pricing_discount_loc,
            rp.total_battery_income_loc,
            rp.total_ev_charger_income_loc,
            rp.total_income_loc,
            rp.total_income_from_customer_loc,
            rp.total_income_from_edea_loc,
            rp.total_other_income_loc,
            rp.total_pv_income_loc,
            rp.city_tax_loc,
            rp.hardware_order_sourcing_cost_loc,
            rp.project_id,
            rp.report_id,
            rp.project_bookable_at,
            rp.project_invoiced_at,
            rp.created_at,
            rr.quarter,
            rr.year,
            rr.business_unit_id
        from reconcilliation_project_latest as rp
        inner join reconcilliation_report as rr on rp.report_id = rr.id
        where rp.ordinal_num_reverse = 1
    ),

    project_reconcilliation_all as (
        select
            id,
            battery_discounted_leasing_months,
            battery_income_from_customer_loc,
            battery_income_from_customer_loc as battery_income_from_customer_eur,
            battery_income_from_edea_loc,
            battery_income_from_edea_loc as battery_income_from_edea_eur,
            battery_transfer_pricing_discount_loc,
            battery_transfer_pricing_discount_loc
            as battery_transfer_pricing_discount_eur,
            currency,
            ev_charger_income_from_customer_loc,
            ev_charger_income_from_customer_loc as ev_charger_income_from_customer_eur,
            ev_charger_income_from_edea_loc,
            ev_charger_income_from_edea_loc as ev_charger_income_from_edea_eur,
            country_code,
            other_income_from_customer_loc,
            other_income_from_customer_loc as other_income_from_customer_eur,
            other_income_from_edea_loc,
            other_income_from_edea_loc as other_income_from_edea_eur,
            pv_discounted_leasing_months,
            pv_income_from_customer_loc,
            pv_income_from_customer_loc as pv_income_from_customer_eur,
            pv_income_from_edea_loc,
            pv_income_from_edea_loc as pv_income_from_edea_eur,
            pv_transfer_pricing_discount_loc,
            pv_transfer_pricing_discount_loc as pv_transfer_pricing_discount_eur,
            total_battery_income_loc,
            total_battery_income_loc as total_battery_income_eur,
            total_ev_charger_income_loc,
            total_ev_charger_income_loc as total_ev_charger_income_eur,
            total_income_loc,
            total_income_loc as total_income_eur,
            total_income_from_customer_loc,
            total_income_from_customer_loc as total_income_from_customer_eur,
            total_income_from_edea_loc,
            total_income_from_edea_loc as total_income_from_edea_eur,
            total_other_income_loc,
            total_other_income_loc as total_other_income_eur,
            total_pv_income_loc,
            total_pv_income_loc as total_pv_income_eur,
            city_tax_loc,
            city_tax_loc as city_tax_eur,
            hardware_order_sourcing_cost_loc,
            hardware_order_sourcing_cost_loc as hardware_order_sourcing_cost_eur,
            project_id,
            report_id,
            project_bookable_at,
            project_invoiced_at,
            created_at,
            quarter,
            year,
            business_unit_id
        from project_reconcilliation
        where currency = 'EUR'

        union all

        select
            pr.id,
            pr.battery_discounted_leasing_months,
            pr.battery_income_from_customer_loc,
            pr.battery_income_from_customer_loc
            * bce.close_rate as battery_income_from_customer_eur,
            pr.battery_income_from_edea_loc,
            pr.battery_income_from_edea_loc
            * bce.close_rate as battery_income_from_edea_eur,
            pr.battery_transfer_pricing_discount_loc,
            pr.battery_transfer_pricing_discount_loc
            * bce.close_rate as battery_transfer_pricing_discount_eur,
            pr.currency,
            pr.ev_charger_income_from_customer_loc,
            pr.ev_charger_income_from_customer_loc
            * bce.close_rate as ev_charger_income_from_customer_eur,
            pr.ev_charger_income_from_edea_loc,
            pr.ev_charger_income_from_edea_loc
            * bce.close_rate as ev_charger_income_from_edea_eur,
            pr.country_code,
            pr.other_income_from_customer_loc,
            pr.other_income_from_customer_loc
            * bce.close_rate as other_income_from_customer_eur,
            pr.other_income_from_edea_loc,
            pr.other_income_from_edea_loc
            * bce.close_rate as other_income_from_edea_eur,
            pr.pv_discounted_leasing_months,
            pr.pv_income_from_customer_loc,
            pr.pv_income_from_customer_loc
            * bce.close_rate as pv_income_from_customer_eur,
            pr.pv_income_from_edea_loc,
            pr.pv_income_from_edea_loc * bce.close_rate as pv_income_from_edea_eur,
            pr.pv_transfer_pricing_discount_loc,
            pr.pv_transfer_pricing_discount_loc
            * bce.close_rate as pv_transfer_pricing_discount_eur,
            pr.total_battery_income_loc,
            pr.total_battery_income_loc * bce.close_rate as total_battery_income_eur,
            pr.total_ev_charger_income_loc,
            pr.total_ev_charger_income_loc
            * bce.close_rate as total_ev_charger_income_eur,
            pr.total_income_loc,
            pr.total_income_loc * bce.close_rate as total_income_eur,
            pr.total_income_from_customer_loc,
            pr.total_income_from_customer_loc
            * bce.close_rate as total_income_from_customer_eur,
            pr.total_income_from_edea_loc,
            pr.total_income_from_edea_loc
            * bce.close_rate as total_income_from_edea_eur,
            pr.total_other_income_loc,
            pr.total_other_income_loc * bce.close_rate as total_other_income_eur,
            pr.total_pv_income_loc,
            pr.total_pv_income_loc * bce.close_rate as total_pv_income_eur,
            pr.city_tax_loc,
            pr.city_tax_loc * bce.close_rate as city_tax_eur,
            pr.hardware_order_sourcing_cost_loc,
            pr.hardware_order_sourcing_cost_loc
            * bce.close_rate as hardware_order_sourcing_cost_eur,
            pr.project_id,
            pr.report_id,
            pr.project_bookable_at,
            pr.project_invoiced_at,
            pr.created_at,
            pr.quarter,
            pr.year,
            pr.business_unit_id
        from project_reconcilliation as pr
        left join
            business_currency_exchange as bce
            on pr.business_unit_id = bce.business_unit_id
            and bce.rate_date = coalesce(pr.project_bookable_at, pr.project_invoiced_at, pr.created_at)::date
    ),

    final as (
        select
            id,
            battery_discounted_leasing_months,
            battery_income_from_customer_loc,
            battery_income_from_customer_eur,
            battery_income_from_edea_loc,
            battery_income_from_edea_eur,
            battery_transfer_pricing_discount_loc,
            battery_transfer_pricing_discount_eur,
            currency,
            ev_charger_income_from_customer_loc,
            ev_charger_income_from_customer_eur,
            ev_charger_income_from_edea_loc,
            ev_charger_income_from_edea_eur,
            country_code,
            other_income_from_customer_loc,
            other_income_from_customer_eur,
            other_income_from_edea_loc,
            other_income_from_edea_eur,
            pv_discounted_leasing_months,
            pv_income_from_customer_loc,
            pv_income_from_customer_eur,
            pv_income_from_edea_loc,
            pv_income_from_edea_eur,
            pv_transfer_pricing_discount_loc,
            pv_transfer_pricing_discount_eur,
            total_battery_income_loc,
            total_battery_income_eur,
            total_ev_charger_income_loc,
            total_ev_charger_income_eur,
            total_income_loc,
            total_income_eur,
            total_income_from_customer_loc,
            total_income_from_customer_eur,
            total_income_from_edea_loc,
            total_income_from_edea_eur,
            total_other_income_loc,
            total_other_income_eur,
            total_pv_income_loc,
            total_pv_income_eur,
            city_tax_loc,
            city_tax_eur,
            hardware_order_sourcing_cost_loc,
            hardware_order_sourcing_cost_eur,
            project_id,
            report_id,
            project_bookable_at,
            project_invoiced_at,
            created_at,
            quarter,
            year,
            business_unit_id
        from project_reconcilliation_all
    )

select *
from final
```


Down in the left-join where I do the coalesce I want to use project_created_at, but I don't have access to this. How can I add that? `and bce.rate_date = coalesce(pr.project_bookable_at, pr.project_invoiced_at, pr.created_at)::date` -> `and bce.rate_date = coalesce(pr.project_bookable_at, pr.project_invoiced_at, pr.project_created_at)::date`

created_at is a column in the project table.
To add `project_created_at` in the `coalesce` statement, you need to ensure that this column is available in the CTEs and subsequent joins in your query. Since `created_at` in your query seems to be referred to as `project_created_at`, you can rename it accordingly to make it clear and consistent.

Here are the changes you need to make:

1. Add `created_at` column (referred to as `project_created_at`) in the `reconcilliation_project_latest` CTE.
2. Pass this column through to the `project_reconcilliation`, `project_reconcilliation_all`, and `final` CTEs.

So, your updated query should look like this:

```sql
{{ config(sort="project_id") }}

with
    reconcilliation_report as (select * from {{ ref("stg_reconcilliation_report") }}),

    reconcilliation_project as (select * from {{ ref("stg_reconcilliation_project") }}),

    business_currency_exchange as (
        select * from {{ ref("int_business_currency_exchange") }}
    ),

    reconcilliation_project_latest as (
        select
            id,
            battery_discounted_leasing_months,
            battery_income_from_customer_loc,
            battery_income_from_edea_loc,
            battery_transfer_pricing_discount_loc,
            ev_charger_income_from_customer_loc,
            ev_charger_income_from_edea_loc,
            country_code,
            currency,
            other_income_from_customer_loc,
            other_income_from_edea_loc,
            pv_discounted_leasing_months,
            pv_income_from_customer_loc,
            pv_income_from_edea_loc,
            pv_transfer_pricing_discount_loc,
            total_battery_income_loc,
            total_ev_charger_income_loc,
            total_income_loc,
            total_income_from_customer_loc,
            total_income_from_edea_loc,
            total_other_income_loc,
            total_pv_income_loc,
            city_tax_loc,
            hardware_order_sourcing_cost_loc,
            project_id,
            report_id,
            project_bookable_at,
            project_invoiced_at,
            created_at as project_created_at,
            {{
                ordinal_num_reverse(
                    partition_by_column="project_id",
                    order_by_column="created_at",
                )
            }} as ordinal_num_reverse
        from reconcilliation_project
    ),

    project_reconcilliation as (
        select
            rp.id,
            rp.battery_discounted_leasing_months,
            rp.battery_income_from_customer_loc,
            rp.battery_income_from_edea_loc,
            rp.battery_transfer_pricing_discount_loc,
            rp.currency,
            rp.ev_charger_income_from_customer_loc,
            rp.ev_charger_income_from_edea_loc,
            rp.country_code,
            rp.other_income_from_customer_loc,
            rp.other_income_from_edea_loc,
            rp.pv_discounted_leasing_months,
            rp.pv_income_from_customer_loc,
            rp.pv_income_from_edea_loc,
            rp.pv_transfer_pricing_discount_loc,
            rp.total_battery_income_loc,
            rp.total_ev_charger_income_loc,
            rp.total_income_loc,
            rp.total_income_from_customer_loc,
            rp.total_income_from_edea_loc,
            rp.total_other_income_loc,
            rp.total_pv_income_loc,
            rp.city_tax_loc,
            rp.hardware_order_sourcing_cost_loc,
            rp.project_id,
            rp.report_id,
            rp.project_bookable_at,
            rp.project_invoiced_at,
            rp.project_created_at,
            rr.quarter,
            rr.year,
            rr.business_unit_id
        from reconcilliation_project_latest as rp
        inner join reconcilliation_report as rr on rp.report_id = rr.id
        where rp.ordinal_num_reverse = 1
    ),

    project_reconcilliation_all as (
        select
            id,
            battery_discounted_leasing_months,
            battery_income_from_customer_loc,
            battery_income_from_customer_loc as battery_income_from_customer_eur,
            battery_income_from_edea_loc,
            battery_income_from_edea_loc as battery_income_from_edea_eur,
            battery_transfer_pricing_discount_loc,
            battery_transfer_pricing_discount_loc
            as battery_transfer_pricing_discount_eur,
            currency,
            ev_charger_income_from_customer_loc,
            ev_charger_income_from_customer_loc as ev_charger_income_from_customer_eur,
            ev_charger_income_from_edea_loc,
            ev_charger_income_from_edea_loc as ev_charger_income_from_edea_eur,
            country_code,
            other_income_from_customer_loc,
            other_income_from_customer_loc as other_income_from_customer_eur,
            other_income_from_edea_loc,
            other_income_from_edea_loc as other_income_from_edea_eur,
            pv_discounted_leasing_months,
            pv_income_from_customer_loc,
            pv_income_from_customer_loc as pv_income_from_customer_eur,
            pv_income_from_edea_loc,
            pv_income_from_edea_loc as pv_income_from_edea_eur,
            pv_transfer_pricing_discount_loc,
            pv_transfer_pricing_discount_loc as pv_transfer_pricing_discount_eur,
            total_battery_income_loc,
            total_battery_income_loc as total_battery_income_eur,
            total_ev_charger_income_loc,
            total_ev_charger_income_loc as total_ev_charger_income_eur,
            total_income_loc,
            total_income_loc as total_income_eur,
            total_income_from_customer_loc,
            total_income_from_customer_loc as total_income_from_customer_eur,
            total_income_from_edea_loc,
            total_income_from_edea_loc as total_income_from_edea_eur,
            total_other_income_loc,
            total_other_income_loc as total_other_income_eur,
            total_pv_income_loc,
            total_pv_income_loc as total_pv_income_eur,
            city_tax_loc,
            city_tax_loc as city_tax_eur,
            hardware_order_sourcing_cost_loc,
            hardware_order_sourcing_cost_loc as hardware_order_sourcing_cost_eur,
            project_id,
            report_id,
            project_bookable_at,
            project_invoiced_at,
            project_created_at,
            quarter,
            year,
            business_unit_id
        from project_reconcilliation
        where currency = 'EUR'

        union all

        select
            pr.id,
            pr.battery_discounted_leasing_months,
            pr.battery_income_from_customer_loc,
            pr.battery_income_from_customer_loc
            * bce.close_rate as battery_income_from_customer_eur,
            pr.battery_income_from_edea_loc,
            pr.battery_income_from_edea_loc
            * bce.close_rate as battery_income_from_edea_eur,
            pr.battery_transfer_pricing_discount_loc,
            pr.battery_transfer_pricing_discount_loc
            * bce.close_rate as battery_transfer_pricing_discount_eur,
            pr.currency,
            pr.ev_charger_income_from_customer_loc,
            pr.ev_charger_income_from_customer_loc
            * bce.close_rate as ev_charger_income_from_customer_eur,
            pr.ev_charger_income_from_edea_loc,
            pr.ev_charger_income_from_edea_loc
            * bce.close_rate as ev_charger_income_from_edea_eur,
            pr.country_code,
            pr.other_income_from_customer_loc,
            pr.other_income_from_customer_loc
            * bce.close_rate as other_income_from_customer_eur,
            pr.other_income_from_edea_loc,
            pr.other_income_from_edea_loc
            * bce.close_rate as other_income_from_edea_eur,
            pr.pv_discounted_leasing_months,
            pr.pv_income_from_customer_loc,
            pr.pv_income_from_customer_loc
            * bce.close_rate as pv_income_from_customer_eur,
            pr.pv_income_from_edea_loc,
            pr.pv_income_from_edea_loc * bce.close_rate as pv_income_from_edea_eur,
            pr.pv_transfer_pricing_discount_loc,
            pr.pv_transfer_pricing_discount_loc
            * bce.close_rate as pv_transfer_pricing_discount_eur,
            pr.total_battery_income_loc,
            pr.total_battery_income_loc * bce.close_rate as total_battery_income_eur,
            pr.total_ev_charger_income_loc,
            pr.total_ev_charger_income_loc
            * bce.close_rate as total_ev_charger_income_eur,
            pr.total_income_loc,
            pr.total_income_loc * bce.close_rate as total_income_eur,
            pr.total_income_from_customer_loc,
            pr.total_income_from_customer_loc
            * bce.close_rate as total_income_from_customer_eur,
            pr.total_income_from_edea_loc,
            pr.total_income_from_edea_loc
            * bce.close_rate as total_income_from_edea_eur,
            pr.total_other_income_loc,
            pr.total_other_income_loc * bce.close_rate as total_other_income_eur,
            pr.total_pv_income_loc,
            pr.total_pv_income_loc * bce.close_rate as total_pv_income_eur,
            pr.city_tax_loc,
            pr.city_tax_loc * bce.close_rate as city_tax_eur,
            pr.hardware_order_sourcing_cost_loc,
            pr.hardware_order_sourcing_cost_loc
            * bce.close_rate as hardware_order_sourcing_cost_eur,
            pr.project_id,
            pr.report_id,
            pr.project_bookable_at,
            pr.project_invoiced_at,
            pr.project_created_at,
            pr.quarter,
            pr.year,
            pr.business_unit_id
        from project_reconcilliation as pr
        left join
            business_currency_exchange as bce
            on pr.business_unit_id = bce.business_unit_id
            and bce.rate_date = coalesce(pr.project_bookable_at, pr.project_invoiced_at, pr.project_created_at)::date
    ),

    final as (
        select
            id,
            battery_discounted_leasing_months,
            battery_income_from_customer_loc,
            battery_income_from_customer_eur,
            battery_income_from_edea_loc,
            battery_income_from_edea_eur,
            battery_transfer_pricing_discount_loc,
            battery_transfer_pricing_discount_eur,
            currency,
            ev_charger_income_from_customer_loc,
            ev_charger_income_from_customer_eur,
            ev_charger_income_from_edea_loc,
            ev_charger_income_from_edea_eur,
            country_code,
            other_income_from_customer_loc,
            other_income_from_customer_eur,
            other_income_from_edea_loc,
            other_income_from_edea_eur,
            pv_discounted_leasing_months,
            pv_income_from_customer_loc,
            pv_income_from_customer_eur,
            pv_income_from_edea_loc,
            pv_income_from_edea_eur,
            pv_transfer_pricing_discount_loc,
            pv_transfer_pricing_discount_eur,
            total_battery_income_loc,
            total_battery_income_eur,
            total_ev_charger_income_loc,
            total_ev_charger_income_eur,
            total_income_loc,
            total_income_eur,
            total_income_from_customer_loc,
            total_income_from_customer_eur,
            total_income_from_edea_loc,
            total_income_from_edea_eur,
            total_other_income_loc,
            total_other_income_eur,
            total_pv_income_loc,
            total_pv_income_eur,
            city_tax_loc,
            city_tax_eur,
            hardware_order_sourcing_cost_loc,
            hardware_order_sourcing_cost_eur,
            project_id,
            report_id,
            project_bookable_at,
            project_invoiced_at,
            project_created_at,
            quarter,
            year,
            business_unit_id
        from project_reconcilliation_all
    )

select *
from final
```

Here, `created_at` is renamed to `project_created_at` throughout all relevant CTEs and used in the `join` condition to replace the old `created_at`. This way, the `coalesce` function now uses `project_created_at` correctly.
I think this will be wrong - because now you're just renaming the report's created_at
summary: Adding project_created_at column to dbt SQL model for currency conversion
